title: My Girl Tisa
writer: Lucille S. Prumbs, Sara B. Smith, Allen Boretz
actors: Lilli Palmer, Sam Wanamaker, Akim Tamiroff
plot: 1905 was a period of heavy immigration from Europe to America before laws were passed restricting the flow of immigrants. Almost every character in this movie is a recent arrival. Tisa has been in America only four months, yet she...
